name: z-auth
description: Z_Auth modular monolith with OAuth/OIDC and Pramaan identity primitives

scripts.up-dev: docker compose -p zauth_dev -f docker/compose.base.yml -f docker/compose.dev.yml --env-file env/.env.dev up
scripts.up-prod: docker compose -p zauth_prod -f docker/compose.base.yml -f docker/compose.prod.yml --env-file env/.env.prod up -d
scripts.down: docker compose -p zauth_dev -f docker/compose.base.yml -f docker/compose.dev.yml --env-file env/.env.dev down
scripts.test-e2e: docker compose -p zauth_test -f docker/compose.base.yml -f docker/compose.test.yml --env-file env/.env.test up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from zauth-core-test
scripts.test-e2e:down: docker compose -p zauth_test -f docker/compose.base.yml -f docker/compose.test.yml --env-file env/.env.test down -v
